settings.title: Instant lift
settings.text: Microcurrent stimulates facial muscles for a visibly lifted look.

settings.title: Sculpt & contour
settings.text: Define your jawline, cheekbones and brow.

settings.title: De-puff
settings.text: Drain morning puffiness in one short session.

settings.title: Salon results at home
settings.text: Skip the R600 facial — same tech, your bathroom.

settings.question: Does it hurt?
settings.answer: Not at all — most people feel a gentle tingle or nothing. Start low and build up.

settings.question: When will I see results?
settings.answer: An instant lift after session one; firmer, sculpted results build over 4–6 weeks of regular use.

settings.question: Do I need a special gel?
settings.answer: Yes — microcurrent needs a water-based conductive gel. Add ours at checkout.

settings.question: How long is delivery?
settings.answer: Ships from our supplier — allow 2–4 weeks, tracking emailed. Free shipping across South Africa.
